caption:
A tiny tabby kitten, wearing a miniature firefighter helmet and breathing heavy, steam-like puffs, is desperately trying to unplug a giant, sparking toaster from a wall socket that reaches the moon, driven by pure panic that the entire solar system will catch fire! 🔥🚒🐱✨
#CatHero #SpaceCrisis #TinyProblems #FelineFear #EpicFail #MoonMission
